task.domains: (topic task) (topic hi-d) (topic ui-d) (topic sw-d) (topic indexing-d) (topic ut-d) a(base ishcondition) a(base varid) a(base varref) a(base cid) a(base partslist) (topic oce-d) (topic sdlVariables-c) (topic oceCommonElements-c) (topic oceMetaDecl-c) (topic oceTopic-c) (topic oceTopic-c task oceTask-c) (topic oceTopic-c hi-d oceHighlight-c) (topic oceTopic-c ui-d oceUi-c) (topic oceTopic-c sw-d oceSoftware-c)
task.title: 11 Windows security updates

abstract.p: Cumulative updates, include all preceding updates.
The updates are long term cumulative updates. They sometimes need supporting updates to be installed. Example: service stack update from Microsoft.
The software version of the Microsoft windows operating system at installation is reported in the section "What is new in software version "

li.p: It is preferred that the installation of updates is done by the customer.
A customer can be triggered automatically by setting the email address for the system administrator.
See also(Configure a mail server for password recovery and Notifications in the operation guide).
Updates can be retrieved in 2 ways:

p.b: Automatically offered via On Remote Service (ORS)

li.p: The version is offered via the ORS system and shown in the settings editor. Depending on the configuration, the files are automatically downloaded and installed. Preferred settings are; download automatically and install automatically. Select either ‘immediate’ or ‘at specified time’ whatever fits best the customers .
Manual download (in case of a not ORS connected system):
The updates are downloadable via https://downloads.cpp.canon/ (or via Graphiplaza.cpp.canon).
As these are cumulative updates only the latest version is provided for download.
Please use the Installation manual provided on the download website when installing.
As these are cumulative updates only the latest version is provided for download.
Question: What happens when a newer update has already been applied when installing an update.
Answer: In the installation phase the update will be ignored. In the list of installed operating system updates the entry will not show up.
Question: What happens when the software of the controller is reinstalled.
Answer: The updates are not present anymore. Install the most recent update (again).
Question: In the settings editor a system software update and a windows update a present. What should I do?
Answer: Install the system software update. A windows update will be undone by the system software update.
Question: After the installation, no windows update is presented anymore in the update list. The next day there is. Did something go wrong?

Answer: The windows updates are published every night to the machine. So, directly after an installation of the system software it can happen that no windows update is shown. If still applicable the update will pop up the next day. The customer can then install the windows updates himself.
Question: I see two windows updates in the list of windows updates. What to do?
Answer: Install only the latest one. After the installation is done, revoke the remaining windows updates that is provided via ORS.

note.p: You need fleet manager rights is ORS to be able to do this.

li.p: Question: where to find the windows version of the system?
Answer: Go to ORS and via search find the applicable engine via its serial number and open the selected engine.
The windows version can be found via Remote data -> Software.
You need fleet manager privileges in ORS to be able to do this.
